headline: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) Q1 2026: Revenue Miss Clouds Strong FFO Beat
summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities Q1 2026: FFO beat of $1.73/shr overshadows revenue miss of $671M vs $690.67M estimate. Stock rises 0.86% after-hours.
